summary: Decomp/matching work for Yoshi special-move code, primarily ftYs_SpecialS.c with smaller ftYs_SpecialHi.c and header/type updates. The loaded diff shows multiple previously stubbed Yoshi Side-B/SpecialS routines implemented, one SpecialHi helper partially improved, prototypes corrected, and support includes/types added. The bot report records 9 new 100% matches and 11 additional unmatched-item improvements.

key_files.role: Primary implementation file; adds most Yoshi SpecialS/Side-B routine bodies and helper inlines, including animation/physics/collision-adjacent helpers, effect spawning, rotation/scale updates, and callback setup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: replaces stubs for ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F0DC, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F35C, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_* and ftYs_SpecialAirSEnd_Anim excerpts
text_corpus: bot report lists 9 new matches and 10 ftYs_SpecialS unmatched-item improvements

key_files.role: Secondary implementation file; adds fn_8012E110 body, moves setDamageCallbacks earlier, uses MAX macro, adds lb_00B0 include and placeholder include.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_8012E110 implemented and ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C changes max() to MAX()
text_corpus: bot report lists fn_8012E110 improvement 0.00% to 94.02% and ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C 96.03% to 97.06%

key_files.role: Yoshi type/field support changed to back the recovered SpecialS/SpecialHi code.
Item header signature/interface updates for Yoshi egg throw calls used by SpecialHi code.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialHi.c calls it_802B2A10 and it_802B28C8
raw_diff: changes UNK_RET ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48(UNK_PARAMS) to void ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48(Fighter_GObj* gobj)

key_files.role: Header changed, but exact contents are not present in the loaded diff excerpt.

what_changed: Implemented several Yoshi SpecialS functions that were previously represented by decomp stubs, including ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F0DC, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F35C, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_0_Anim, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_1_Anim, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_2_Anim, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_3_Anim, and ftYs_SpecialAirSEnd_Anim in the loaded diff/report evidence.
Added static inline helpers in ftYs_SpecialS.c for repeated SpecialS behavior: callback setup, wall-bounce effect spawning, scale update, rotation wrapping, and button-pressure checking.
Changed ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48 call sites from no-argument calls to gobj-passing calls and updated a header prototype from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48(Fighter_GObj* gobj).
In ftYs_SpecialHi.c, implemented fn_8012E110 with egg item spawning/throwing logic, damage callback assignment/clearing, and a small outline wrapper around ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C.
Replaced a local max helper in ftYs_SpecialHi.c with the project MAX macro while continuing to use ABS in the nearby math.
Changed ftYs_Unk3_803CEDA4 representation in ftYs_SpecialS.c from a Vec3 array initializer shape to a single ftCollisionBox initializer.
Added includes for camera, common fighter fall/fallspecial headers, ftcoll, lb forward, mplib, trigf, ftYs_Init, and related dependencies needed by the recovered code.
Bot report recorded matched-code progress: overall +5484 bytes, +0.14%, 9 new matches, and 11 unmatched-item improvements.
smart_moves: Updated recovered function signatures in headers instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS after the body shape was known.
Used existing project macros MAX and ABS rather than retaining a one-off local max helper.
Kept address-style names such as fn_8012EC7C and ftYs_Unk3_* where the loaded PR evidence does not prove semantic names.
Introduced narrowly scoped static inline helpers for repeated or call-shape-sensitive logic rather than duplicating callback, scale, rotation, and effect code throughout the file.
Used typed field/member access such as fp->mv.ys.specials.*, fp->fv.ys.*, fp->parts[index].joint, and ftCollisionBox rather than raw pointer arithmetic in the shown recovered code.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves a function signature, update the owning header and call sites together; this PR changed ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48 from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to void with Fighter_GObj* and updated callers to pass gobj.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialAirSStart_* call sites changed to ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48(gobj)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Prefer existing project expression macros for common math operations when they express the recovered code; this PR removed a local max helper and used MAX alongside ABS.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline float max removed

decomp_lessons.lesson: Small static inline helpers can make repeated decomp logic reviewable while preserving recurring state operations such as scale update, angle wrapping, effect spawning, and callback setup.
Use existing typed structures when the data shape is clear; the diff changes a six-value collision-box initializer from a Vec3-array shape to ftCollisionBox.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_Unk3_803CEDA4 changed from static Vec3[] to static ftCollisionBox

naming_conventions.convention: Use short local role names for common decomp objects when roles are clear: fp for Fighter*, gobj for Fighter_GObj/HSD_GObj, jobj for HSD_JObj, attrs/attributes for ftYoshiAttributes, cd for CollData.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: ftYs_SpecialS.c helper and function bodies

naming_conventions.convention: Retain address-style function/data names when semantics are not proven by the PR slice, e.g. fn_8012E110, fn_8012EC7C, fn_8013295C, ftYs_Unk3_803CED48.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: function and data names remain address-style in recovered code

naming_conventions.convention: Use semantic helper names for locally obvious operations, such as setDamageCallbacks, ftYs_SpecialS_UpdateScale, ftYs_SpecialS_WrapAndSetRotX, and ftYs_SpecialS_SpawnWallBounceEffect.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static helper declarations in ftYs_SpecialHi.c and ftYs_SpecialS.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was inserted in several recovered functions, indicating stack-shape steering for matching; the bot report supports resulting matches/improvements, but the loaded evidence does not isolate each PAD_STACK's individual necessity.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: PAD_STACK in fn_8012E110, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F0DC, ftYs_SpecialS_8012F35C, ftYs_SpecialAirSLoop_* excerpts
text_corpus: bot report lists 9 new matches and 11 improvements

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: A tiny outline wrapper ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C_outline calls ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C before use in fn_8012E110, likely serving call/inline code-shape control, but the slice does not include author explanation.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: static inline ftYs_SpecialS_8012DF8C_outline added and called from fn_8012E110

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Angle normalization uses repeated while loops adding/subtracting 2*M_PI before ftPartSetRotX/RotY, a natural loop form visible in multiple recovered routines.
Switch over fp->cmd_vars[0] replaced/generated command dispatch in ftYs_SpecialS_8012EB48, matching normal C control flow for discrete command values.
The bot report is the only loaded verifier evidence: 9 named functions reached 100%, while several other functions improved but remained below 100%.

source_update_candidates.title: ftYs_SpecialS.c owns much of Yoshi SpecialS/Side-B behavior
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2307 evidence shows src/melee/ft/chara/ftYoshi/ftYs_SpecialS.c implementing Yoshi SpecialS/Side-B animation, physics/collision-adjacent state transitions, scale/rotation updates, hit capsule timing, wall/floor effects, and callback setup.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report ftYs_SpecialS matches and improvements
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-level ownership fact, but should be curated against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: ftYs_SpecialHi.c interacts with Yoshi egg throw item helpers
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2307 evidence shows fn_8012E110 in ftYs_SpecialHi.c spawning/storing an item with it_802B2A10 and throwing/updating it with it_802B28C8, while setting and clearing Yoshi damage callbacks around fp->fv.ys.x2238.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential path fact about fighter-item interaction; should be checked against current source and item header ownership.

source_update_candidates.title: PAD_STACK and outline wrappers need per-function evidence
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2307 uses PAD_STACK and a tiny outline wrapper in recovered code while the bot report shows aggregate matches/improvements. Curator may want examples under the existing matching-tactics standard, emphasizing that these tactics should remain narrow and tied to verifier evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential illustrative example for an existing standard, not a new accepted rule from this PR alone.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all PAD_STACK uses in this PR were independently necessary; the loaded evidence only provides aggregate bot match/progress output.
Do not infer semantic meanings for address-style symbols such as fn_8012E110 or ftYs_Unk3_803CED48 beyond their local usage in the diff.
Do not treat the .sdata2 improvement as proof of intentional data-section cleanup; the PR title/body do not scope data work and the diff excerpt is incomplete.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale; no human review comments are present in the loaded slice.
